name: holoshelf
description: Windows-only personal Hololive catalog, music, talent, and bracket shelf.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.verify:fast: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names types,unit,e2e "npm run typecheck" "npm run test:changed" "npm run e2e:smoke"
scripts.verify:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names unit,e2e,build "npm test" "npm run e2e" "npm run build"
scripts.verify:ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run e2e
scripts.release:verify: npm run release:check-version && npm run release:seed && npm run release:audit && npm run verify:full
scripts.release:verify:ci: npm run release:check-version && npm run release:seed && npm run release:audit && npm run verify:ci
scripts.release:preflight: npm run release:verify && npm run release:local
scripts.release:local: npm run package:installer && npm run release:assert
scripts.release:install:local: npm run release:local && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/install-local-release.ps1
scripts.release:data:local: npm run release:data:refresh && npm run release:bump:patch && npm run release:install:local
scripts.release:ci: npm run release:verify:ci && npm run release:clean && electron-builder --win --dir --publish never && node scripts/apply-win-resources.mjs && node scripts/write-app-update-config.mjs && electron-builder --win --prepackaged release/win-unpacked --publish always && npm run release:assert
scripts.package:exe: npm run release:clean && npm run release:seed && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir --publish never && node scripts/apply-win-resources.mjs && node scripts/write-app-update-config.mjs
scripts.package:installer: npm run package:exe && electron-builder --win --prepackaged release/win-unpacked --publish never

author: Holoshelf contributors

releaseInfo.releaseNotes:
- Added Song View to Detailed Stats
- Added live ratings that update after every completed matchup
- Added Stat History with match evidence and grouping options
- Improved Strength of Wins and Losses history tracking
- Improved talent limits and solo/group song detection
- Song data, duplicate filtering, and library cleanup updates
- UI polish and bug fixes
